text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Medication Therapy Management Enrollment │ May 2024│ V 1.3 15 

COG_IMPAIRED 

LABEL: Beneficiary Identified as Cognitively Impaired 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates if the beneficiary was identified as being cognitively impaired at the time of the 
CMR offer or delivery 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: Y = Yes 
N = No 
U = Unknown 

COMMENT: CMS created the MTM file from
